---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
---

## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve? What's your use case?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work?

## Example Usage

Show a concrete example:

```
Print document → [Feature behavior] → Get result
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought about other approaches?

## Additional Context

- Links to similar projects or features elsewhere
- Mockups or design sketches (if applicable)
- Research or technical notes

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read SPEC.md and this aligns with project scope
- [ ] I have searched existing feature requests
- [ ] I am willing to contribute this feature (if accepted)
